programme.title: Kinds of Kindness
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated stories.Emma Stone, Jesse Plemons and Willem Dafoe play various roles.A corporate manager (Jesse Plemons) lives under the dictates of an eccentric boss (Willem Dafoe).She puts his well-being above her own and doesn't question any outlandish demands.Stripped of his dignity, he tries to free himself from total control.A policeman (Jesse Plemons) misses his wife (Emma Stone) - a biologist who disappeared during a research expedition.A woman who survived the disaster returns, but her marriage is put to the test.The husband becomes paranoid and is not sure if this is the same beloved he once married.The heroes of the last story are members of a sect who are looking for a person with the power to resurrect the dead.The work of Yórgos Lánthimos - the director of "Poor Things" which won four Oscars.For his performance, Jesse Plemons was awarded the Palme d'Or at Cannes.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: The year is 1996. Two alienated teenagers, Owen (Justice Smith) and Maddy (Brigette Lundy-Paine), reach an understanding in the school corridor.They share a fascination with the late-night TV series "The Pink Opaque."Its heroines, Tara (Lindsey Jordan) and Isabel (Helena Howard), although they live in different parts of the USA, use their spiritual bond to fight a villain called Mr. Melancholia (Emma Portner).Over time, both Maddy and Owen begin to believe that the world of their favorite production is more real than the reality in which they live.Two years later, Maddy admits to a friend that she is planning to escape.Her disappearance coincides with "The Pink Opaque" being taken off the air.

programme.title: King Charles III
programme.desc: After the death of Elizabeth II, her son Charles (Tim Pigott-Smith) takes over power in Great Britain.During his first meeting with Prime Minister Tristan Evans (Adam James), he learns about the draft law regulating the rights of the press, which has already been adopted by both the House of Commons and the House of Lords and is only awaiting the king's consent.Charles refuses to sign it, fearing that the new law will limit press freedom and allow the government to use censorship.Then, due to the prime minister's threat to introduce the law without royal consent, he dissolves parliament.Soon a wave of protests begins to sweep across the country, with the most violent taking place in London.The difficult situation at Buckingham Palace is not improved by a sex scandal involving the ruler's younger son, Prince Henry (Richard Goulding), related to the publication of compromising photos of him with his lover, Jessica (Tamara Lawrance).Charles's older son, William (Oliver Chris), and his wife Catherine (Charlotte Riley) also do not support the king.The young man accuses his father of causing the crisis and demands that he abdicate.A film version of Mike Bartlett's play of the same title.The author is also the author of the script for this production.

programme.title: Sound of Metal
programme.desc: Drummer Ruben (Riz Ahmed) and vocalist Lu go on tour.A passionate musician realizes that he is losing his hearing.The life he loved begins to fall apart and the future is uncertain.

programme.title: One of Them Days
programme.desc: Dreux (Keke Palmer) and Alyssa (SZA) are like lovebirds, they have been friends for years and share an apartment.Their everyday lives suddenly turn upside down when they discover that Alyssa's boyfriend has squandered all their savings - money that was supposed to be used to pay the rent.The girls face a real challenge: in an atmosphere full of funny adventures, they must quickly find a way to get the missing amount and avoid eviction.It quickly turns out that they will be forced to take truly unusual actions to not only save their home, but also put their friendship to the test.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: Hacks 3
programme.desc: A year after satirist Deborah Vance (Jean Smart) and Ava parted ways, the former is enjoying the success of her stand-up comedy.The second one is looking for new professional opportunities in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hacks 3
programme.desc: A year after satirist Deborah Vance (Jean Smart) and Ava parted ways, the former is enjoying the success of her stand-up comedy.The second one is looking for new professional opportunities in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Doc Ii.
programme.desc: Dr. Amy Larsen, former chief of internal medicine, is rebuilding her life after a tragic accident that left her with no memory.Now she is an intern.Her past still haunts me.

programme.title: Summer Camp
programme.desc: As children, Ginny (Kathy Bates), Nora (Diane Keaton) and Mary (Alfre Woodard) spent every summer together.When, after 50 years, there is an opportunity to meet again - at a summer camp meeting, the friends decide to take advantage of it, although with varying levels of enthusiasm.The least satisfied with her holidays is workaholic Nora, who feels best in her own company.Despite this, she and her friends take on new challenges, such as rafting or a rope park.Additionally, there, the woman meets her former lover, Stevie D (Eugene Levy).Thanks to him and the camp atmosphere, things start to change.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: Many years before Snow White's birth, Queen Ravenna (Charlize Theron) observes the actions of her sister, Freya (Emily Blunt), who is in love with a man named Andrew.Soon their daughter is born.Shortly thereafter, the child is murdered.At the same time, Freya discovers that she has the power to control ice.The woman leaves Ravenna's lands with a broken heart.He creates his own kingdom and an army of deadly hunters.There is only one rule in their ranks: never to love.It is broken by two warriors - Eric (Chris Hemsworth) and Sara (Jessica Chastain).Freya decides to separate them.Seven years later, after Ravenna's death, Snow White decides to get rid of the evil queen's mirror, moving it to the sanctuary.Some time later, William informs Eric that the soldiers who were responsible for the expedition have gone missing.The hunter suspects Freya - the mirror could significantly increase her power.He agrees to complete the mission, with the help of the dwarves.

programme.title: House of the Dragon 2
programme.desc: The second series of the production, the events of which precede the action of "Game of Thrones".After the death of Lucerys Velaryon, the son of Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen (Emma D'Arcy), which was caused by his cousin, Aemond Targaryen (Ewan Mitchell), Westeros finds itself on the brink of a bloody civil war.The Green Council supporting King Aegon (Tom Glynn-Carney) and Queen Rhaenyra's Black Council are fighting for influence.Each side claims the Iron Throne.The dynamic development of events also affects the attitude of Rhaenyra's husband, Daemon (Matt Smith), in life.A man who spends a lot of time in Harrenhal Castle, away from his wife, changes a lot.In addition, the demons of his past begin to haunt him.

credits.actor: King Aegon II Targaryen - Tom Glynn-Carney
Lord Corlys 'The Sea Snake' Velaryon - Steve Toussaint

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Two ice hockey players, Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie), are united not only by ambition and the need for competition, but also by a magnetic attraction that neither of them fully understands.What begins as a secret romance between two debutants turns into an extraordinary love journey.Athletes spend eight years chasing fame on the ice rink while trying to deal with their feelings off it.They must decide whether there is room for something as fragile as love in a world of brutal competition.

credits.actor: Man in the Crease Host #2 - Shaun Starr
Man in the Crease Host #1 - Conor McKenna

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Peacemaker 2
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1980s. The life of bullied teenage Niall (Mitchell Robertson) turns upside down when the son of his mother's partner, the fierce and unpredictable Ruben (Stuart Campbell), comes to live with them for a while.Even though they are not related by blood, over time they both become inseparable.However, subsequent events make them move away from each other.Three decades later, Ruben (Richard Gadd) shows up uninvited at Niall's (Jamie Bell) wedding.It soon becomes clear why he reconnected with his long-lost brother.A suggestive story about the fragility of male relationships, brotherhood, betrayal, loyalty and violence.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: The year 2050. Mickey Barnes (Robert Pattinson) takes out a loan on usurious terms.Wanting to escape from an aggressive debt collector, together with his friend Timo (Steven Yeun), he joins the crew of a spaceship that is to colonize the ice planet Niflheim.However, when the second of them becomes a shuttle pilot, Mickey - not entirely consciously - becomes the person assigned to the most dangerous tasks.When he dies, in a process called reprinting, a clone of himself is created, which retains his memories.The situation of the version of man number 17 becomes even more complicated when, contrary to expectations, he is not killed during one of the missions, and when he returns to the ship, he finds Mickey 18 there. In these circumstances, the commander of the expedition, Hieronymous Marshall (Mark Ruffalo), decides to eliminate both of them.A surprising, fast-paced and humorous picture by the Oscar-winning writer and director of "Parasite", Bong Joon Ho.The production is an adaptation of the novel by Edward Ashton.

programme.title: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story
programme.desc: Rock star Dewey Cox (John C. Reilly) seems to have done it all.The musician sold millions of records, won the hearts of hundreds of women, and his friends included such giants as Elvis and members of The Beatles.The artist's life consists primarily of performances in front of the audience and crazy, alcohol-infused parties.Cox does not shy away from various types of stimulants, and he cannot stay in a relationship with one woman for long.However, the most important thing for him is music, thanks to which he turned from a simple boy from the province into one of the world's greatest rock icons.Twice nominated for the Golden Globe (Best Actor and Best Original Song), a crazy parody of films about famous musicians inspired by the biographies of such musical personalities as Johnny Cash and Roy Orbison.

programme.title: Peacemaker 2
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1980s. The life of bullied teenage Niall (Mitchell Robertson) turns upside down when the son of his mother's partner, the fierce and unpredictable Ruben (Stuart Campbell), comes to live with them for a while.Even though they are not related by blood, over time they both become inseparable.However, subsequent events make them move away from each other.Three decades later, Ruben (Richard Gadd) shows up uninvited at Niall's (Jamie Bell) wedding.It soon becomes clear why he reconnected with his long-lost brother.A suggestive story about the fragility of male relationships, brotherhood, betrayal, loyalty and violence.

programme.title: This is the end
programme.desc: A series of paranormal events take place in Los Angeles, reminiscent of the end of the world.As a result of the chaos in the city, a group of friends are trapped in an apartment.Unfortunately, their situation is becoming more and more dramatic by the minute: they are running out of food and free space, which gives rise to conflicts.Finally, having no other choice, they decide to leave the apartment and face the chaos outside.The wacky comedy is the directorial debut of two comedians: Seth Rogen and Evan Goldberg.In addition to brilliant humor, the film is full of fierce irony directed at American celebrities.The main roles were played by: James Franco ("Citizen Milk", "127 Hours"), Jonah Hill ("Moneyball", "The Wolf of Wall Street"), Danny McBride ("Divine Chillout", the series "It Could Be Worse"), Emma Watson ("Harry Potter") and singer Rihanna.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The ninja turtles defeated their eternal enemy Shredder and each of them found a different job.Michaelangelo makes money at children's parties as a mascot.Donatello works as a telephone operator, and Leonardo exercises his character in solitude.Only Raphael remained faithful to his old ideals and fights hooligans at night.Meanwhile, Master Splinter begins to see signs of impending danger.Immortal entrepreneur, Maximilian J. Winters decides to take control of New York, and later the entire world.To do this, he summons his four stone generals and tries to open the gate to another dimension.Only a team of Teenage Mutant Turtles can stop him.

programme.title: Esperando a Dalí
programme.desc: Barcelona, ​​1974, a period of intense opposition to Franco's dictatorship.Brothers Fernando (Ivan Massagué), a chef, and Alberto (Pol López), an activist, must hide from the authorities.They find shelter in Cadaqués, a picturesque seaside village that is also the home of the famous artist Salvador Dalí (Gal Soler).In this setting, the brothers meet Lola (Clara Ponsot), who helps them find work.Fernando, influenced by Dalí's works and his infatuation with women, finds a passion for creating unique dishes.The man's ambitions grow, especially when Jules (José Garcia), Lola's eccentric father, dreams of organizing a dinner for Dalí himself.Despite the difficulties, Fernando creates a culinary masterpiece that inspires a revolution in the world of taste, which leads to the creation of the famous Surreal restaurant.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas Tail
programme.desc: Riley runs a shelter for homeless animals.Fate puts in her path... a prince.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: The Goldsmith's Secret
programme.desc: 1999. Goldsmith Juan Pablo travels from Spain to New York for an exhibition of his works.On the way he passes through his hometown.He will meet Celia, a great love who changed his life.

programme.title: Wolfgang (extraordinari)
programme.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, nine-year-old Wolfgang (Jordi Catalán), an exceptionally gifted boy with features on the autism spectrum, is forced to live with his father, Carles (Miki Esparbé), whom he has never met before.An orderly nine-year-old who strives for perfection cannot stand his father's chaotic lifestyle.He wants to escape to Paris to study at the Grimald Academy and become the best pianist in the world.When Carles discovers his plan, he must make the most important decision in his life: follow his dream of an acting career or sacrifice his plans and become the father Wolfgang really needs.

programme.title: Four Letters of Love
programme.desc: Ireland.Margaret (Helena Bonham Carter) and Muiris (Gabriel Byrne) Gore have two children, Sean (Dónal Finn) and Isabel (Ann Skelly).The family's happiness is disturbed by the unexpected illness of their son.On another part of the island lives William Coughlan (Pierce Brosnan), who quit his job and left his loved ones to follow his dreams of being a painter.The fates of two families intertwine thanks to the Gore's daughter and the son of an unfulfilled artist, Nicholas (Fionn O'Shea).It turns out that young people are made for each other, even though they know nothing about each other.Destiny and the desire for love push them towards each other.Adaptation of the book of the same title by Niall Williams.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Police officers Sonny Crockett and Ricardo Tubbs are assigned to a dangerous mission.They are busting a gang of drug smugglers, led by a man named Montoya.The trafficker is believed to be involved in the murder of two federal agents and the family of their informant.Crockett and Tubbs infiltrate the Montoi organization.Sonny begins an affair with Isabella, who invests the proceeds of crime in legal ventures.Crockett tries to protect his lover, having no idea what the woman actually does and what her true identity is.Meanwhile, Tubbs and his girlfriend, analyst Trudy Joplin, try to understand the activities of criminals using their own methods.Ricardo does not know that he is putting his beloved in danger.Wanting to reach the gang leader, two detectives decide to transport a load of drugs to southern Florida.Gradually, the lines between the rules of the underworld and the rule of law are blurring.

programme.title: The Knick
programme.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

credits.actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen
